publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2021-07-19 18:34:36 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.physdesc: Minutes, correspondence, financial records, clippings, photographs, and club notices and newsletters
did.abstract: Minutes, correspondence, financial records, clippings, club notices and newsletters (1909-1987); minutes (1887-1901); photographs of banquets, etc. Subjects include shows, the Fellowship and Scholarship Committee, and other activities pertaining to floriculture.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Minutes, correspondence, financial records, clippings, club notices and newsletters (1909-1987); minutes (1887-1901); photographs of banquets, etc. Subjects include shows, the Fellowship and Scholarship Committee, and other activities pertaining to floriculture.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: New York Florists' Club records, #4532. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

did.unittitle: 1950 International Flower Show, Grand Central Palace
I Fellowships and Scholarships - reports of research articles, etc. from Club grants
II Fellowships and Scholarships - reports of research articles, etc. from Club grants
Cornell University Floriculture Employee Management Program sponsored by New York Florists Club
1970 International Flower Show, Inc. since May 1970 seal, papers, etc. - trade space contracts
International Flower Show, Inc. - second floor
International Flower Show, Inc. - Plant Societies (1st floor)
International Flower Show, Inc. - exhibitors, first floor
World War II Service Men's Committee
World War II Service Men's Committee (1)
Seal press: International Flower Show, Inc.
Seal press: Metropolitan Flower Growers Association, Inc.
Rubber stamp: Metropolitan Flower Growers Association, Inc.
Certificate of Incorporation: Metropolitan Flower Growers Association, Inc.
Photograph: 45th Annual Dinner and Dance of the New York Florists' Club
Photograph: Banquet of the Florist's Club
Photograph: S.A.F. and O.H., Organization Meeting of Regional Unit, Hotel Pennsylvania
Photograph: 58th Annual Dinner Dance, New York Florists Club, Hotel Pennsylvani
Photograph: New York Florist Club Annual Outing, Rye New York
